## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory interview between Edwin Martinez Mejia and Bridget McGillivray for a potential EA role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Edwin's background: 5 years at Tapclicks as EA to CEO, seeking new growth opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Edwin's strengths: Passion for learning, AI/automation skills, creative problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [GrowthX needs: High-volume communication management (email, Slack, LinkedIn) for CEO Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Cultural fit: Both value continuous learning, innovation, and efficiency in fast-paced environments](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)

## Topics

### Edwin's Background and Motivations

  - [5 years at Tapclicks as EA to CEO and changing C-suite](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Seeking new challenge due to company direction shift](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Passionate about learning and gaining new knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Excited by GrowthX's AI focus and rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### GrowthX Overview and Needs

  - [Unconventional SaaS model: 50 customers, large contracts, services-based](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Founded by ex-CMO Marcel with strong LinkedIn presence (\~100k+ followers)](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [High-volume communication management needed:](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [Email (Gmail)](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [Slack (customer + internal channels)](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [LinkedIn messages](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)

### Edwin's Relevant Skills and Experience

  - [AI/automation expertise:](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
      - [Created AI-generated "podcast" videos for marketing](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
      - [Produced AI webinar content that went undetected](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Email management:](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
      - [Developed Gmail automation for sorting internal/external comms](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
      - [Working on further categorization of top-priority emails](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
  - [Prefers direct, upfront communication (STBS: "stop the BS")](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)

### Potential Challenges and Solutions

  - [High-volume Slack management:](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
      - [Previous EA solution: Create "Marcel.All" channel for tagged/important messages](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [LinkedIn volume:](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [Current CEO manages personally, works long hours (4am-midnight)](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Repetitive tasks drain energy:](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
      - [Edwin uses gamification techniques for motivation](https://fathom.video/share/BQQhG7yEK546-eDxQxFLPjPQHfAoqZQj?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
